vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Tool flange with standard bolt pattern and locating boss

generated_parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
generated_parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

requirements: Base rotary joint providing rotation for the industrial arm
Harmonic drive enclosed within the joint
Cable entry grommet for power and signal cables
Base plate with mounting holes for structural integrity
Service access for maintenance and inspection

verify.value: All required fields are present.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary sections and attributes are included.
Ensure the estimated mass does not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All internal features are represented in the geometry operations.
verify.rule: Ensure each design requirement is mapped to specific geometric elements.

verify.value: Interfaces are clearly defined and reciprocal between adjacent modules.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are consistent and allow for proper assembly.

verify.value: Critical joints include locking methods and preload/torque specifications.
verify.rule: Ensure fastener joints are properly secured and preloaded.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials (Al 7075 and steel).
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies and use compatible materials.

risk.desc: Risk of harmonic drive failure if not properly lubricated.
risk.mit: Specify lubrication requirements and ensure regular maintenance.

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief for cables exiting the base joint.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features to protect cables from mechanical stress.

risk.desc: Possible misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Refine manufacturing tolerances and include alignment aids.

risk.desc: Risk of corrosion at exposed fastener joints.
risk.mit: Apply anti-corrosion treatments or use corrosion-resistant fasteners.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint providing rotation for the industrial arm

physics_paths.description: Rotation provided by motor to joint axis
Payload forces transmitted through arm to base structure
Heat dissipation from motor heatsink to ambient air

integration_opportunities.description: Cable entry grommet provides access for power and signal cables
Base plate includes a small inspection window for bearing health checks
Harmonic drive enclosure allows for easy replacement of the harmonic drive mechanism

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining for aluminum parts, LPBF for complex geometries
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: IT6 for critical interfaces, IT8 for general fit
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional accuracy, visual inspection for surface finish
